name: ScaleWise
description: Autonomous resource scaling for distributed infrastructures.

page_content.headline: ScaleWise
page_content.heroCopy: Predict load, optimize resources, and scale your infrastructure with zero manual intervention. Built on the next‑gen Neural Engine.

benefits.title: Predictive Load Balancing
benefits.desc: Our AI anticipates traffic spikes before they hit your nodes, ensuring zero downtime during critical surges.

benefits.title: Cost Optimization
benefits.desc: Intelligently decommission idle resources to reduce cloud waste by up to 40% without compromising performance.

benefits.title: Instant Deployment
benefits.desc: Deploy in minutes with native 1‑click integrations for AWS, GCP, Azure, and private cloud clusters.

deepDive.title: The Neural Engine
deepDive.copy: Unlike traditional threshold-based scaling, the Neural Engine uses temporal pattern recognition to understand your application's unique heartbeat. It learns from history to engineer the future of your infrastructure.

deepDive.title: Global Edge Network
deepDive.copy: ScaleWise operates across 140+ global points of presence. By distributing the scaling logic to the edge, we reduce latency and ensure your infrastructure responds instantly to users, regardless of geography.

testimonial.quote: ScaleWise didn't just save us money on our AWS bill; it gave our engineering team back 15 hours a week. It's the silent architect every high-growth startup needs.
testimonial.author: Marcus Thorne

integrity.title: SOC2 Type II
integrity.desc: Fully compliant with the highest industry security standards.

integrity.title: 99.99% Uptime
integrity.desc: Guaranteed reliability with our premium service level agreement.

integrity.title: REST & GraphQL
integrity.desc: Deeply extensible API architecture for custom workflows.

integrity.title: End-to-End Encryption
integrity.desc: Your infrastructure metadata is encrypted in transit and at rest.

cta.heading: Ready to scale?
cta.body: Join 2,000+ companies optimizing their infrastructure with the intelligence of ScaleWise.

name: OmniGraph
description: Relational data visualization for complex ecosystems.

page_content.headline: OmniGraph
page_content.subhead: See Every Connection. Own Every Decision.
page_content.heroCopy: Turn tangled systems into clean, navigable graphs—so teams can trace lineage, ownership, and impact in minutes.

benefits.title: Dependency Mapping
benefits.desc: Visualize services, data, and ownership in real-time.

benefits.title: Impact Analysis
benefits.desc: Understand how a change cascades across systems before you ship.

benefits.title: Fast Scanning
benefits.desc: Large graphs feel calm, readable, and actionable.

deepDive.title: Graph Intelligence Engine
deepDive.copy: OmniGraph uses advanced layout algorithms to keep large graphs scannable. Zoom from a 10,000-foot view down to individual edges without losing context.

testimonial.quote: OmniGraph turned our architecture reviews from 2-hour meetings into 10-minute walkthroughs.
testimonial.author: Sarah Lin

integrity.title: SOC2 Type II

integrity.title: REST & GraphQL

integrity.title: End-to-End Encryption

cta.heading: Ready to see clearly?
cta.body: Join teams using OmniGraph to navigate complexity with confidence.

name: FlowGenie
description: Generative automation for repetitive operational tasks.

page_content.headline: FlowGenie
page_content.subhead: Automate the Repetitive. Focus on the Important.
page_content.heroCopy: From runbooks to intelligent workflows: reduce operational toil without sacrificing control.

benefits.title: Smart Workflows
benefits.desc: Generate automation flows from natural language descriptions.

benefits.title: Guardrails Built In
benefits.desc: Approvals, diffs, and audit trails for every automated action.

benefits.title: Rollback-First
benefits.desc: Every action is reversible with one click.

deepDive.title: Generative Workflow Engine
deepDive.copy: Describe what you want in plain English and FlowGenie generates the workflow, complete with error handling and rollback steps.

testimonial.quote: FlowGenie cut our ops toil by 60% in the first month. The guardrails make automation feel safe.
testimonial.author: James Okoro

name: NeuralHub

page_content.headline: NeuralHub
page_content.heroCopy: A calm, contextual workspace for real institutional learning. Connect decisions to incidents, runbooks to outcomes.

benefits.title: Contextual Knowledge
benefits.desc: Connect decisions to incidents, runbooks to outcomes, patterns to teams.

benefits.title: Smart Search
benefits.desc: Find answers instantly with AI-powered semantic search.

benefits.title: Team Learning

deepDive.title: Contextual Intelligence Layer
deepDive.copy: NeuralHub doesn't just store docs — it understands relationships between knowledge, incidents, and teams.

testimonial.quote: NeuralHub transformed how our distributed team shares knowledge. Onboarding time dropped 40%.
testimonial.author: Priya Sharma
